commit.message: [FLINK-16173][build] Reduce noise for used undeclared dependencies
[FLINK-16173][build] Reduce noise for used undeclared dependencies

[FLINK-16189][e2e] Remove test logic from FlinkDistribution

The FlinkDistribution is now a simple wrapper, which makes it easier to use in ways that do not match the jUnit resource life-cycle.
